chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 600 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.2490/2023 (Ex./A) 2. For hearing of main case 20.03.2024 Petitioners No.1, 2 and 31 are present in person. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Hizbullah Korejo, District Education Officer (Primary), Naushahro Feroze..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned AAG Sindh submits that as per Government policy, as and when the seats of Primary School Teachers would fall vacant, petitioners or anyone else, who have already qualified the IBA test by obtaining more than 40 marks, would be considered and appointed as per the said policy against the available vacancies till 2025. Accordingly, petitioners are satisfied, and this petition is disposed of along with listed application, in above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
